hero.title: Ukusuka kwimfuno yokufikeleleka ukuya kwi-repo yoluntu
hero.lead: I-IATF inceda imibutho, amaqela, kunye nabantu ukuba baguqule iimfuno zokwenyani zokufikeleleka zibe ziiprojekthi zomthombo ovulekileyo.
support: Iiprojekthi ezamkelweyo zipapashwa kumbutho we-IATF GitHub phantsi kwelayisensi ye-copyleft kwaye ziphuhliswe esidlangalaleni yinjineli enoxanduva.

paragraphs: Ngokusebenzisa ifom, nabani na angathumela ingxaki yokufikeleleka kwi-IATF. Ukuba iqela lingayithatha, indawo yoluntu yeGitHub ivuliwe ngomsebenzi.
Iprojekthi nganye eyamkelekileyo inendawo ecacileyo yoluntu yekhowudi, imiba, amaxwebhu, kunye nokukhutshwa, kunye nophuhliso olukhokelwa kwindawo evulekileyo yinjineli enoxanduva.

header.title: Isebenza njani
header.intro: Imodeli ihlala incinci ngenjongo ukuze indlela kawonke-wonke ilula ukuyilandela.

steps.title: Isidingo sichaziwe
paragraphs: Umbutho, iqela okanye umntu ngamnye angenza isicelo esisekelwe kwimfuno yokwenene yokufikeleleka.
Izicelo zingaqaliswa kwiwebhsayithi, nge-imeyile contact@iatf.cc, okanye ngeDiscord.

steps.title: I-IATF iyayivavanya
paragraphs: Siye sihlolisise ukufaneleka komsebenzi, ububanzi obusebenzisekayo, nokuba umsebenzi ufanelekile kusini na kwiprojekthi yomthombo ovulekileyo kawonke-wonke.

steps.title: Indawo yokugcina yoluntu iyenziwa
paragraphs: Ukuba iprojekthi yamkelwe, ipapashwa kwi-GitHub ye-IATF phantsi kwelayisensi ye-copyleft.
Indawo yokugcina iba likhaya loluntu lwekhowudi, imiba, amaxwebhu, kunye nokukhutshwa.

steps.title: Injineli enoxanduva ikhokela iprojekthi
paragraphs: Injineli enoxanduva yabelwe kwindawo yokugcina iiprojekthi kwaye uphuhliso lwenzeka esidlangalaleni.

header.title: Khangela umsebenzi okhoyo okanye uqalise iprojekthi ethile

paragraphs: Sebenzisa irejista ukubona ukuba yintoni esele isesidlangalaleni, okanye uqalise ukungenisa ukuba ingxaki ethile yokufikeleleka kufuneka ibe yiprojekthi.
